title: Family Cost-Sharing Calculator
summary: Split an estimated monthly caregiving cost across family members — evenly, by income, or however feels fair to your family.
regionNote: This splits a number you provide — it doesn't estimate caregiving costs itself. If you need help arriving at a total, try the Monthly Cost Estimator first.
disclaimer: This is a planning tool meant to support a conversation, not a legal or financial determination of what anyone owes. What's fair often depends on more than income alone — time contributed, distance, and circumstances this tool can't see. Treat the result as a starting point for a family conversation, not the final word.
